title: Credentials of electors
doc_html:
§1262.  Credentials of electors

The governor shall transmit the credentials of presidential electors to the appropriate federal officials in the manner provided by the constitution and laws of the United States.

Acts 1976, No. 697, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1978.
doc_text:
§1262.  Credentials of electors
The governor shall transmit the credentials of presidential electors to the appropriate federal officials in the manner provided by the constitution and laws of the United States.
Acts 1976, No. 697, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1978.
